translations.en: a commanding presence: a tall warrior in black armor.
translations.zh: 氣勢懾人的高大武士，身著黑色鎧甲。

translations.en: He stands and bows to you. "`$G.
translations.zh: 他起身向你行禮。「`$G，
translations.note: split string，下接 Art thou a warrior?

translations.en: Art thou a warrior?"
translations.zh: 汝可是武士？」

translations.en: "Then why hast thou come to Serpent's Hold?"
translations.zh: 「那汝為何來蛇之要塞？」

translations.en: "Good! I seek @courageous warriors to accompany me."
translations.zh: 「好！吾正在尋覓@courageous（勇敢）的武士同行。」

translations.en: "Who wants to know?"
translations.zh: 「哪位在問？」

translations.en: "Well, `$Z, I am Baron de Hugh."
translations.zh: 「哦，`$Z，吾乃德于格男爵。」

translations.en: "I am a @mercenary now."
translations.zh: 「吾現在是名@mercenary（傭兵）。」

translations.en: "First I shall gather an @army."
translations.zh: 「首先吾要聚集一支@army（大軍）。」

translations.en: "I plan to build my reputation as a great fighter."
translations.zh: 「吾計劃以強悍戰士之名建立聲望。」

translations.en: "My army and I will kill the mighty daemon @Sin'Vraal!"
translations.zh: 「吾與大軍將誅殺那強大的邪靈@Sin（辛弗）拉！」

translations.en: "He is a malevolent creature, lord over numerous servants who crawl about the @desert."
translations.zh: 「他是凶惡的生靈，統御著眾多在@desert（沙漠）中爬行的僕役。」

translations.en: "It is on the north-eastern tip of Britannia. Look it up on a map."
translations.zh: 「就在不列顛尼亞的東北角。查地圖吧。」

translations.en: "It is foolish to be courageous unless one is backed by a well-trained force of fighters."
translations.zh: 「若無訓練精良的戰力支援，展現勇氣不過是愚蠢之舉。」

translations.en: "Or unless one happens to be the @Avatar, I imagine."
translations.zh: 「或者，除非你碰巧是@Avatar（聖者），我想。」

translations.en: "I heard at the @guild that the Avatar was in town!"
translations.zh: 「吾在@guild（公會）聽說聖者來到這一帶了！」

translations.en: "@Koronada says I will be considered for membership when I have done something noteworthy."
translations.zh: 「@Koronada（科羅）那達說，吾一旦建立功績，便會被考慮入會。」

translations.en: "Have ye ever done aught worthy of note?"
translations.zh: 「汝可曾立下值得一提的功績？」

translations.en: "He is firm but fair.  He does not wish to see any unworthy person bear the Silver Serpent @blazon."
translations.zh: 「他嚴格但公正。他不願見到任何不配之人配戴銀蛇@blazon（盾徽）。」

translations.en: "I believe the silver serpent is a quick and highly venomous creature."
translations.zh: 「吾相信銀蛇是一種行動敏捷、毒性極強的生物。」

translations.en: "A blazon is a shield marking, such as a @serpent."
translations.zh: 「盾徽是盾牌上的紋章標記，例如@serpent（蛇）。」

translations.en: "Good luck, $G."
translations.zh: 「祝汝好運，$G。」

translations.en: "That I cannot help ye with."
translations.zh: 「此事吾幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "Well, actually, neither have I!"
translations.zh: 「說實話，吾也沒有！」

translations.en: "Then surely Koronada has heard of ye.  Tell him your name and he may invite ye to join the Silver Serpent @guild."
translations.zh: 「那科羅那達必然聽說過汝。去告訴他你的名字，他或許會邀汝加入銀蛇@guild（公會）。」

translator_notes: 德于格男爵是野心勃勃的傭兵，想殺死辛弗拉以建立聲望，從而加入銀蛇騎士團。他自承尚未建立任何值得一提的功績（自嘲喜感）。古語半文言風格（吾/汝/hast thou/aught）。
